# Chifanlema (吃饭了吗)

> The best app for learning Mandarin Chinese vocabulary.

Chifanlema ("Have you eaten?") is a micro-learning app that teaches Mandarin Chinese vocabulary through a TikTok-style feed, AI-powered search, stroke order animations, and lock screen widgets. It covers 25,000+ words across HSK levels 1–6 and 77 topic categories, with bilingual definitions in English and Vietnamese.

## Core Features

- **Word Feed**: Swipe through vocabulary in a full-screen vertical feed. "Daily Words" delivers a personalized set based on your HSK level, while "For You" adapts to your learning history.
- **AI Chat Search**: Ask anything in English, Vietnamese, or Chinese. Get streaming AI responses with word breakdowns, example sentences, and contextual follow-up suggestions.
- **Stroke Order**: Interactive character writing with HanziWriter. See each stroke animated step-by-step.
- **Native Pronunciation**: Auto-play audio as you scroll. AI-generated TTS plus real native speaker recordings from Tatoeba.
- **Lock Screen Widgets**: iOS WidgetKit and Android Glance widgets show daily words on your lock screen.
- **Collections & History**: Browse by HSK level or 77 topic categories. Track history, bookmark favorites, and organize personal collections.
- **Shareable Word Cards**: Generate beautiful 4:5 word cards with pinyin, meaning, and example sentences.
- **Voice Search**: Speak in Chinese, English, or Vietnamese to search.
- **Bilingual Interface**: Full English and Vietnamese UI throughout.

## Getting Started

1. Choose your HSK level (1–6)
2. Set a daily goal (5, 10, 20, or 30 words)
3. Swipe and learn through your personalized feed

## About

Built by an indie developer in Vietnam. Free to use with an optional premium subscription for an ad-free experience and unlimited AI searches.
